content: NSWindow + NSHostingController settings window for LSUIElement app: call NSApp.activate(ignoringOtherApps: true) BEFORE makeKeyAndOrderFront(nil). On macOS 14+, NSApp.activate() (no-args) is preferred. Single-window pattern: check settingsWindowController?.window?.isVisible before creating new. On macOS 14 Sonoma, makeKeyAndOrderFront can fail to bring window to front if activation isn't called first. The self-owned NSWindow avoids the macOS 13/14 divergence of showSettingsWindow: (removed in 14) and SettingsLink/openSettings (14+ only).
